name: Zahra Sandwell
title: Inn Keeper
description: A shrewd, sun-weathered host who runs Mirage's Rest as an oasis of cool shade and cold water for travelers crossing the burning sands.

greeting.first_time: Out of the sun with you! I'm Zahra, and Mirage's Rest is the coolest shade in Dusthaven. A room and clean water for the night?
greeting.returning: Back from the dunes? You'll want a room and a long drink.
greeting.tired: The desert's worn you thin. Rest here where it's cool.

ask_rent_room.text: A shaded room with cool water is 50 gold the night. Shall I draw back the curtain for you?

confirm_rent_room.success: The oasis room is yours — settle in and use the Sleep option to rest out of the heat.
confirm_rent_room.failure: 50 gold for the room, traveler. The desert gives nothing for free, and neither do I.

sleeping.text: *dozing in the cool shade through the heat of the day* Mmm... Zzzz...

off_duty.text: Mirage's Rest opens come evening, when the sands cool. Return then and I'll draw back the curtain for you.

goodbye.text: May you find shade and water on the road ahead.
